creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Martin Wilke from comment #2)

Others BSD are already switched to ConsoleKit2.

xfce4-powermanager-plugin and xfce4-session >= 4.13 work better with it. LXQt can't be imported in ports tree because ConsoleKit 0.4.x lacks missing functions (especially reboot and shutdown). Plasma5 contains backend for ConsoleKit2.
